findings.evidence: `rg -n "lemma regular|def regular" code/TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck` shows adjacent `regularSubgroupFiberOrbitQuotient...` declarations take `hreg : IsRegular p`, while line 276 only takes `[PreconnectedSpace E] (hp : IsCoveringMap p)`.
findings.fix: Rename it to a non-regular name such as `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_smul_eq_base_iff_of_isCoveringMap` or add the missing regular hypothesis if the API is meant to match the adjacent regular wrappers.
findings.issue: `regularSubgroupFiberOrbitClass_smul_eq_base_iff` uses the `regular...` prefix but has no `IsRegular p` hypothesis; it is a preconnected-cover freeness wrapper, not a regular-cover specialization.

summary: One introduced wrapper is named as a regular-cover lemma although its statement only assumes a preconnected covering, unlike the adjacent `regular...` API.
